name: MarketSmith
description_short: IBD's MarketSurge/MarketSmith research platform for growth stock investors using CAN SLIM-style ratings, screens and chart pattern tools.
description_long:
MarketSmith is now best understood through IBD's MarketSurge product family: a premium growth-stock research platform built around William O'Neil's CAN SLIM investing methodology. The platform combines proprietary IBD ratings, chart pattern tools, institutional ownership data, stock lists and screening workflows for investors who want a rules-based growth-stock process.

The product is not a general-purpose broker or trade journal. Its value depends on whether the user actually follows IBD-style earnings, relative strength, industry group and chart-base discipline. Traders who mostly need intraday scanning, options flow, portfolio accounting or journal analytics should compare specialist tools instead.

Current IBD product pages advertise MarketSurge Premium at $149.95/month after the introductory term, with premium features included. Because IBD promotions change frequently, buyers should verify the current offer and renewal amount at checkout.

tiers.name: 6-Week Trial
features: Introductory access terms vary by current IBD offer
Premium tools included during the paid term

pros: CAN SLIM methodology is proven over decades
cons: Only useful for CAN SLIM and growth investing
Steep learning curve for the methodology
meta_description: MarketSmith and IBD MarketSurge reviewed for CAN SLIM research, growth-stock screening, pricing, best uses and alternatives.
